source_note: Public list prices as documented on the snapshot date. Cache-read pricing (10% of fresh-input for Anthropic) is applied when the model_info.usage record reports cache_read_input_tokens; cache-write pricing (125% of fresh-input for Anthropic) is applied to cache_creation_input_tokens. OpenAI reasoning-token billing follows the dated snapshot's published rate. These prices are approximate and change. Verify against the provider's current pricing page before using for actual cost decisions.

llm-summary-v1-haiku.note: Reducer runs claude -p --model haiku under Claude Code OAuth. Token usage is what Anthropic's API reports; cache-read overhead from Claude-Code session priors is included in those numbers. USD column reflects what you'd pay on a direct API call with the same usage.
